author: IT部小明 / itbxm
avoid: Do not use dense full-page repeats behind readable body text.
Do not use catalog previews, corner experiments, or nine-slice frame experiments as production defaults.
Do not scale small repeat units so large that edge rhythm becomes visually noisy.
description_zh: 适合用于网页、PPT、封面和长图中的标题条、分隔线、侧边装饰、低透明底纹和分层叠印背景。
usage_prompt: Use this Tang-style Chinese guofeng ornament as a divider, header band, side border, subtle background, cover accent, or layered print texture.
